evals.prompt: Translate https://pokepast.es/50c3bdabb5fe8186 into structured Chinese artifacts and an HTML share card.
evals.expected_output: Produces team-raw.json, team-zh.json, validation-report.json, review-suggestions.json, and share-card.html with no unresolved translations.

evals.prompt: Build artifacts for https://pokepast.es/65b7228ad81523a5 and keep structural validation separate from review suggestions.
evals.expected_output: validation-report.json contains only structural findings and review-suggestions.json remains deterministic.

evals.prompt: Render a mobile-friendly HTML team card from https://pokepast.es/d9260baad4fd55f8 using configured asset URLs.
evals.expected_output: share-card.html uses configured image URLs, translated species names, and the selected template.
